_comment: Order of class_names MUST exactly match softmax output indices of model.h5. Edit before production.

treatments_en.cotton_bacterial_leaf_blight: Remove infected leaves; spray copper oxychloride (follow label dose). Rotate varieties next season per Maharashtra cotton advisory; avoid sprinkler irrigation overhead.
treatments_en.cotton_leaf_curl_virus: Control whitefly vectors (imidacloprid as per Maharashtra IPM guideline); remove heavily infected plants; use virus-free certified seed.
treatments_en.cotton_healthy: Maintain balanced NPK, timely irrigation during square/boll formation, and scouting for sucking pests.
treatments_en.sugarcane_red_rot: Use healthy setts; fungicide dipping as Mandate; drain fields promptly; uproot severely infected stools.
treatments_en.sugarcane_rust: Apply sulphur-containing fungicides at first orange pustules; improve air circulation.
treatments_en.sugarcane_healthy: Fertiliser schedule per VSI recommendations; drip/furrow to reduce fungal leaf splash.
treatments_en.rice_blast: Seed treatment with TTZ if advised; silicon nutrition; fungicide sprays (tricyclazole/azoxystrobin) at booting.
treatments_en.rice_brown_spot: Proper potash; avoid stagnant water logging; fungicide copper/carbendazim as per PAC.
treatments_en.rice_healthy: Balanced basal + topdress as soil test; staggered nitrogen for Maharashtra kharif/rabi.
treatments_en.maize_rust: Grow resistant hybrids; sulfur/triazole spray at symptom onset.
treatments_en.maize_gray_leaf_spot: Wide row spacing where possible; stubble management off-field; fungicide timing per local demo.
treatments_en.maize_healthy: Maintain potash adequacy especially on lateritic soils.
treatments_en.wheat_stripe_rust: Timely prophylactic spray recommended by MPKV; avoid excessive nitrogen spikes.
treatments_en.wheat_septoria: Fungicides at earliest leaf lesions; diversify varieties across farm.
treatments_en.wheat_healthy: Recommended seed rate and split nitrogen for Maharashtra irrigated belts.
treatments_en.soybean_frog_eye_leaf_spot: Fungicides (strobilurins/triazoles) at flowering; widen rotation with cereals.
treatments_en.soybean_bacterial_blight: Use certified seeds; copper sprays early; machinery sanitation between fields.
treatments_en.soybean_healthy: Rhizobium nodulation checks; phosphorus management on deficient plots.

treatments_mr.cotton_bacterial_leaf_blight: संक्रमित पाने काढा; तांबाचे प्रयोग डोसनुसार; फवारणीवरती पाणी टाळा; पुढील हंगामात जाती बदला.
treatments_mr.cotton_leaf_curl_virus: कोळी नियंत्रण (केंद्रीय उपचार); जास्त दिसणाऱ्या झाडे काढा; शुद्ध बियाणे घ्या.
treatments_mr.cotton_healthy: संतुलित NPK आणि बोंड स्थितीवर पूरक पाणी; कीड नियंत्रण.
treatments_mr.sugarcane_red_rot: निरोगी टुकडे घ्या; मशागत ड्रेनेज व्यवस्थित; फार गंभीर झाड काढा.
treatments_mr.sugarcane_rust: पहिल्या लक्षणांवर गंधक घटक असलेली औषधे.
treatments_mr.sugarcane_healthy: VSI टप्प्यानुसार खते; ड्रिप/आळवाने पाने सुकून राहतील यासाठी पाण्याचे व्यवस्थापन.
treatments_mr.rice_blast: बीयाणे उपचार; सिलिकॉन खत; बूटिंगवर घोषणेत नमूद केलेली बुरशीनाशके.
treatments_mr.rice_brown_spot: पालाश प्रमाण टिकवा; स्थिर पाण्याचं तणाव टाळा; तांबे/कार्बंडाझिम.
treatments_mr.rice_healthy: माती चाचणीवर базल + टॉपड्रेस; नत्र विभागणी.
treatments_mr.maize_rust: प्रतिरोधक क्रॉस घ्या; पहिल्या लक्षणांवर स्प्रे.
treatments_mr.maize_gray_leaf_spot: ओळींचे अंतर; पूर्ती चारा व्यवस्था; डेमो अनुसार स्प्रे.
treatments_mr.maize_healthy: लेटराइटिक जमिनीवर खत विशेषतः पालाश चांगले घ्या.
treatments_mr.wheat_stripe_rust: MPKV/स्थानिक सल्लागारांनी सांगलेल्या टप्प्यावर स्प्रे; नत्र अतिरेक टाळा.
treatments_mr.wheat_septoria: पानांवरील डाग दिसायच्या उशिरा न घालता स्प्रे; जातीत विविधता.
treatments_mr.wheat_healthy: सिंचित पटावर चांगले बियाणे दर आणि नत्र फोफ.
treatments_mr.soybean_bacterial_blight: प्रमाणित बियाणे; लवकर तांबे स्प्रे; यांत्रिकी स्वच्छता.
